entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Content Material
entry.content:
Hi friends,

I’m currently preparing several presentations about the SAC and was wondering if anyone has any good recommendations for informative materials I could use.

I’d really appreciate any helpful sources you can share.

Looking forward to your suggestions!

Kind regards,
Ismail

entry.title: Re: For ECC clients what will happen to the Graphical Pla...
entry.content:
Thank you very much, Caetano.  

Yes, the drag and drop feature in Fiori's Capacity Scheduling Board will be helpful. But the 3 key functions that the Fiori app does not have the clients need are. 1. Dispatch at earliest point in time. We needed this to fully load a wood treatment cylinder, and 2. Sort operations by Setup Key, and 3. Use the Setup Matrix.

For clients who are not yet on S/4HANA to run PPDS the good old CM21/CM25 Graphical Planning Table is there for them.

Best regards,

Ann

entry.title: Re: How to find the custom ABAP artifacts in the SAP system using the SAP tables.
entry.content:
@Prasenjitsbist No, the title isn't enough. If it was enough, we wouldn't be asking, would we?

This content screams "I do low quality work and I don't care". If that's the vibe you're going for, then this post a smashing success. Carry on. Why bother doing something better, right?

entry.title: Re: Grouping of attributes and HIS attributes
entry.content:
Good day philiphiroshiueno,

Thank you for sharing your inquiry on the SAP Community!  It is recommended that you 

create a support case using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password), as described in this video, to have an expert look into this specific issue.

 

If you have additional questions in creating a support case, you can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center. 

 

Kind regards,

 

KantriceD

entry.title: SAP CPQ Quote 2.0 Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Sales Order
entry.content: why materials (product master data) go directly through SAP Cloud Integration (CPI), while business partners (customers, contacts) must pass through SAP Master Data Integration (MDI), in the CPI Package

entry.title: Re: Receiving Electronic Invoices by Email in SAP S/4HANA, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, or SAP
entry.content:
Hi Konstantin,

thank you for your question!

For more detailed information on how the business system receives and accesses emails to extract XML files, I recommend checking out the Validating and Processing Electronic Invoices Received by E-Mail Using SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, Cloud Edition page. In the Prerequisites section, it outlines what is needed to create electronic documents for both ways (automatically or manually). In your case, please refer to these links: See Setting Up the Inbound Processing for the SMTP Connection and Assigning E-Mail Address to E-Mail Message Type.

These resources should provide the details you're looking for. If you have more questions, feel free to ask!

Best regards,

Monika

entry.title: Universal OData ↔ MCP Bridge; Or: How I Accidentally Made 15,000 Enterprise Services Talk to AI
entry.content:
Or: How I Accidentally Made 15,000 Enterprise Services Talk to AI

In March 2025 I realised the "hard part" of enterprise AI integration was already solved by metadata we've had for years. Two hundred MCP servers suddenly became 15,000+ – with one simple translator. 🚀

 

What Problem Are We Solving?

Hey folks! 👋 This is the logical continuation of my ABAP-native AI journey:

  • ZVDB & ZLLM brought AI into ABAP (vector search, LangChain-lite, local inference)

  • This bridge brings ABAP — and every other OData system — to AI

Enterprises sit on thousands of OData endpoints that already expose clean business semantics, yet modern AI assistants can't reach them. All that was missing was a translator.

 

The "15,000+ MCP Servers" Moment

EcosystemOData services made AI-ready
SAP (ECC → S/4 & BTP)≈ 10,000
Microsoft Dynamics≈ 1,500
Salesforce≈ 800
Oracle Cloud ERP≈ 2,000
SharePoint, ServiceNow & friends≈ 1,000

Total: 15,000+ enterprise-grade services now surface as first-class MCP tools.¹ Not toys—systems that move real money.

 

TL;DR (Four Bullets, Promise!)

  1. Code → GitHub: oisee/odata_mcp (Python) & oisee/odata_mcp_go (Go) (link in first comment)

  2. Problem → $2T of software speaks OData; 0% speaks MCP

  3. Solution → Bridge auto-discovers every entity/action; zero config

  4. Result → Your ERP landscape is AI-accessible in under two minutes

 

Why This Matters—The "So What?"

Role 
CTO / ArchitectAll legacy & cloud systems become AI-ready today—no vendor roadmap, no middleware
DeveloperOne interface for SAP, Dynamics, Oracle, Salesforce—write once, chat everywhere
Business user"Claude, approve all POs < $50k" – and it just happens
 

The "Wait, That's It?" Moment

  • OData = REST + machine-readable metadata

  • MCP = JSON-RPC + tool definitions AI assistants understand

  • Bridge = translate the metadata to tool definitions. That's it.

➡️Just translate between them—and you've unlocked the whole enterprise. 🤔

 

Two Flavours, Same Power

 PythonGo
Startup~3s~0.3s
Memory~150 MB~30 MB
Best forPrototyping & demosProduction workloads
Shared superpowersFull CRUD, function imports, CSRF juggling (hi SAP 👋), Basic auth, Cookies auth

Demo: From Skepticism to "Holy Wow"

 

 

Enterprise Reality Demo

 

The Auto-Discovery Magic ⭐

OData's metadata does 90% of the work; the bridge just speaks fluent MCP.

Want the deep dive?

Check the repo or catch me on SAP On Azure Podcast 🎙️

 

The Hidden Cost of Waiting

 Vendor AI (Joule / Copilot / Einstein)Bridge Today
AvailabilityCloud-only, phased rolloutAny OData v2/v3—even ECC 2007
CoverageSingle vendorEntire landscape
Time-to-value6-18 months< 2 minutes
Data locationVendor cloudStays on-prem / your VPC
Vendor-LockHighZero (MIT licensed)
 

Security & Governance (Because Enterprise)

  • Runs inside your network — nothing leaves unless you proxy it

  • Honours existing roles — if users can't see it in GUI or Fiori - they can't see it via MCP

  • Audit trail-ready — every request loggable with full context

No new attack surface—just a protocol translator.

 

The Ecosystem Just Shifted

When 15,000+ production services become AI-accessible overnight, MCP stops being a dev toy and becomes the enterprise standard. This isn't iteration—it's inflection.

A Day in Your New AI-Powered Life

 

09:00  "Claude, what needs my attention?"
       → 3 POs > $40k awaiting approval (SAP)
       → Customer escalation (ServiceNow)
       → Budget variance on cost center 4210 (Dynamics 365)
09:05  "Approve the POs from established vendors, escalate to Sarah, schedule variance review."
       → Done. Next?

Five minutes. One assistant. Zero UI clicks.

 

What Could Go Wrong? (Let's Be Honest)

  • Query complexity: Some OData implementations choke on deeply nested $expands

  • Rate limits: Your backend might not love 100 requests/second from an enthusiastic AI

  • Schema changes: When your OData model changes, tools need regeneration

  • Governance: "Claude, show me all salaries" works if your auth is broken

But these are solvable with basic ops hygiene—rate limiters, caching, and proper RBAC.

 

Get Rolling in Two Minutes

  1. download pre-built binary for your platform: Release Universal OData ↔ MCP Bridge v1.0.0 (Multi-Platform Binaries) · oisee/odata_mcp_go
  2. copy/rename to the appropriate folder (like C:/bin/ )
  3. update your claude_desktop_config.json correspondingly:
{
    "mcpServers": {
        "northwind-go": {
            "args": [
                "--service",
                "https://services.odata.org/V2/Northwind/Northwind.svc/",
                "--tool-shrink"
            ],
            "command": "C:/bin/odata-mcp.exe"
        }
    }
}

Add as many services as you want: just repeat with different --service argument

Instructions on how to build from source code - in README here: oisee/odata_mcp_go

⭐Star the repo if this unlocks value for you!

 

What's Next

  • Stay tuned for next week's deep dive: "10 Mind-Blowing Things You Can Build When Your ERP Speaks AI"

But honestly? Even this changes everything.

Try It. Break It. Make It Better.

Here's what I need from you amazing people:

  1. Try it with your systems - SAP, Dynamics, whatever you've got

  2. Break it creatively - I love good bug reports

  3. Add your system's quirks - Every OData implementation is a special snowflake

  4. Share what you build - The crazier the use case, the better

Drop a PR, open an issue, or just share what happens when you connect your enterprise to AI.

Want This as an Azure Service?

Look, this open-source bridge proves the concept works. But I know what you're thinking - "Great Alice, but what about enterprise deployment, monitoring, compliance, support?"

Fair point. What if this was available as a managed Azure service? Zero setup, enterprise SLA, built-in monitoring, automatic scaling...

Drop a comment if you want that. 😉

 

P.S. Yes, it handles all the authentication properly. Yes, it respects permissions. Yes, it works with your ancient SAP system from 2007. No, I don't know why this wasn't built years ago either. (Well, actually, I might know.)

P.P.S. First prompt I'll run in production: "Claude, find every place we're leaving money on the table." 💰

 

¹ Counts derived from SAP annual report (2024), Microsoft Dynamics docs, Salesforce API catalog, Oracle ERP Cloud guides, and the public awesome-mcp-servers list; full methodology in /analysis/service-counts.csv.

#EnterpriseAI #OData #MCP #OpenSource #AIIntegrationCP #OpenSource #AIIntegration

you can either use ac activity which has MSE as  base unit of measurement 

or assign a bigger plan price in kp26

Ghazal Afshar

entry.title: Re: Receiving Electronic Invoices by Email in SAP S/4HANA, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, or SAP
entry.content:
Hello Monika, 

thank you very much for the quick reply. 

I believe I grasp the answer now. SAP as the core system does not receive emails directly as it is not an smtp server however SAP offers integration possibilities to "easily" connect an SMTP server and basically forward the emails. 

Another questions arises from this understanding: 
Lets say a supplier incorrectly sends the same invoice twice in different emails. Is my understanding correct, that SAP does not do any checks regarding the validitiy and correctness of the received invoices, e.g SAP will not check for duplicate invoices. SAP DRC will only validate and check e-invoice correctness but thats it, right? Meaning the smtp server would need to include some logic to prepare the invoice before forwarding them to SAP? 

Thank you and best regards, 

Konstantin

As this functionality is currently not available in MDK standard control, I would suggest you to open a feature request here.

entry.content:

WalkMe for SAP SuccessFactors HCM

entry.title: It is not Possible to Extend an Extension Field to the Customer Contract Header Data Source
entry.content:
Dear Support,
we have created a custom field in Sales Contract under General, so that means it should apply for the whole contract.
We would like to have this field the the data source "Contract Header". But we do not see a way to activate it in contract header, the system seems to allow only to activate in data source contract items.


Is it possible to have this field in contract header data source at all?
Thank you & best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: It is not Possible to Extend an Extension Field to th...
entry.content:
Our technical documentation states that, if a data source is not listed on the Data Sources and Reports tab from the Further Usage of the Extension Field functionality, it cannot be extended with the field. Please refer to the KBA 3567194 - Unable To Add Extension Field To Report As Data Sources Are Missing for further insights.

Therefore, this is the expected system behavior. However you might want to extend the extension field to one of the available data sources.

 

To be aware of the available Data Sources/reports for each Business Context, please kindly check the SAP Help Documentation - Data Sources Enabled for Extension Fields.

All of the information on this scenario is clearly documented on both the KBA and the Help Portal.

As an alternative, you can also submit a new Improvement Request on SAP Customer Influence website or vote for existing ones.

This way, we can kindly consider this feature to be implemented on Business ByDesign in the future, as we already did to many other customers, and improve our environment.

Please, kindly check KBA 2531827 - Functionality Currently not Available, this is the way we can provide you a better experience and keep you satisfied with our solutions.

entry.title: Re: Why Is My Content Marked as Spam?
entry.content: @AnnePetteroe Tnx a million for prompt response and assistanse ^_^

entry.title: C4C V2 <> S4 Public Prospect to Account confirmation error
entry.content:
Hello Community,
We are working on integrating SAP Sales Cloud V2 with S/4HANA Public Cloud, using SAP Cloud Integration (CI) as the middleware.
When we convert a prospect to an account, the data is successfully replicated to S/4HANA Public Cloud — we can see the customer created in the target system. However, we are not receiving any confirmation back, and the integration fails in CI.
Upon investigation, it appears that S/4HANA Public Cloud is sending a SOAP message, whereas the pre-delivered SAP iFlow expects a JSON payload in the message mapping. This mismatch is causing the failure.

Error: com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occurred: A JSONObject text must begin with '{' at 1 [character 2 line 1].
Has anyone else encountered this issue?
Do we need to raise an SAP incident for this, or is there a known workaround or configuration that we might be missing?
Looking forward to your input. 

Best regards, Aditya

entry.title: Re: Universal OData ↔ MCP Bridge; Or: How I Accidentally Made 15,000 Enterprise Services Talk to AI

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Fully-Activated Appliance: Create your SAP S/4HANA system in a fraction of the usual
entry.content:
Hello Jonkgreen, 

it is 793 PL214 but you can also update the Kernel (since you have OS access). 

Best, Joerg

entry.title: How to provide access to only one IAM App inside a Business Role?
entry.content:
Hi, 

In SAP Public Cloud a single catalogue is configured with multiple IAM apps. Is there any way to provide access to only one app inside a Business Role?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to provide access to only one IAM App inside a Bu...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

With IAM apps of type app authorization variant (app authorization variants) you have the flexibility to manage authorizations for business users on a more granular level by activating or deactivating individual app authorization variants according to your business requirements.

IAM apps that are bundled in a business catalog are activated by default. However, you have the option to deactivate individual IAM apps according to your business requirements. This allows you to assign only the apps that are required for a business role to it. You can follow the steps below:

  1. Open the Maintain Business Roles app.

  2. Select a business role.

  3. Go to the IAM Apps tab.

    All IAM apps that are assigned to the selected business role, for example of type app authorization variant, are displayed.

  4. If certain IAM apps are not required for the selected business role, select them and click on "Deactivate"

 

For more information, please check the following documentations:

How to Activate or Deactivate IAM Apps of Type App Authorization Variant

Work with IAM Apps of the App Authorization Variant Type

 

Kind regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Request to add to "Community Coffee Corner Feedback List"
entry.content: @Juwin, it has been fixed now 🙂

entry.title: S4Hana Public Cloud GSTR1 Report - Validation Pattern not Errors & Warnings
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While generating GSTR1 report in S4Hana public cloud I am getting below errors, can anyone guide me on how to resolve these errors.

1. Value TN does not match the validation pattern ^(3[0-8]|[12][0-9]|0[1-9]|96|97)$

2. Value 450.00- is less than the min. permitted value 0

3. Value is not of the min. required length 2

I am aware that, we can edit and replace above values for example "TN" with 33 etc.,, but we can't edit and correct the data for thousands of line items.  I have already configured consistency settings etc., in the CBC.

Can anyone guide me on exactly from which configuration node, system pics and generates the Json file with above values?

Thanks,

Basu.

 

 

4. Value 00000000 does not match the validation pattern ^(0[1-9]|1[0-9]|2[0-8]|29((?=-([0][13-9]|1[0-2])|(

entry.title: Re: How to see the script of system stored procedures
entry.content: Thanks man.

entry.title: GI status completed in EWM but ERP status not getting updated, There are no queue, PPF green too.
entry.content: This is happening for a Consignment sales order’s delivery, other consignments sales order’s delivery is successfully updated.

entry.title: Why is Profit Center mandatory during Cost Center creation?
entry.content:
We would like to know why Profit Center is mandatory while we create Cost Centers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Why is Profit Center mandatory during Cost Center cre...
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


Profit center accounting is enabled by default in the system, and it is mandatory to enter the profit center while creating a cost center. Creation of cost center without a profit center is not allowed. You can also refer to the below KBA:

3522633 - Error 'Profit Center Accounting is enabled, but no profit center was specified ' obtained while creating cost center


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to Upload .mtaext File to a Node in SAP Cloud Tra...
entry.content:
@SvenRullmn

Thank you very much for your quick reply! I have reviewed my request and corrected it as below, and It worked!

### Upload mtaext
@nodeid=4
POST {{apiUrl}}/v2/nodes/{{nodeid}}/mtaExtDescriptors
Authorization: Bearer {{TokenRequest.response.body.access_token}}
Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=----WebKitFormBoundarymtaextupload
tms-named-user: MioYasutake

------WebKitFormBoundarymtaextupload
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="prod.mtaext"
Content-Type: application/octet-stream

< ./prod.mtaext
------WebKitFormBoundarymtaextupload
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="mtaVersion"

1.0.0
------WebKitFormBoundarymtaextupload
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="description"

Extension file for production
------WebKitFormBoundarymtaextupload--

entry.title: Re: Insurance Manual Task Creation - Activity Management
entry.content:
Hi Brendan,

On your screenshot, I can see that you are trying to create the task on subclaim level. Please double-check that you assigned the manual task to the corresponding subclaim type on subclaim level and not on header level. In the internal claim type customizing, there is customizing table to assign the permitted manual tasks on claim header level and another one to assign them to a subclaim type on subclaim level.

Michael

entry.title: Re: Test Script Download Error in SAP Signavio Process Na...
entry.content: SAP Support answered one day later, 2024-04-09 the following: "This issue has been fixed. We apologize for the inconveniences." --> Thus nothing to learn for the community... Rgds - Ingo

entry.title: Sales return generating multiple Nota Fiscal
entry.content:
I performed a sales return transaction and set it up to "Refund Type: Credit Memo" and "Refund Control: Create Credit Memo". After processing the return delivery the system created two "Nota fiscal" documents: one referring to a sales return invoice, which is correct, and another one referring to a Correction Invoice, which is not expected to happen.

Sales return:

First Nota fiscal (returning - correct):

Second Nota Fiscal (correction 😞

Has anybody faced the same ?

Regards

 

Salim

entry.title: Need Help Querying C203 (Display Master Recipe) – Recipe, Operations, Components, Scrap Data
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm working with SAP Transaction Code C203 – Display Master Recipe and trying to extract detailed recipe data using the appropriate tables that have been ingested into GCP.  For each structure, please use only valid tables and joins 

I need help constructing either a single query or a set of split queries to pull this data efficiently. I'm especially struggling with component scrap data and how to cleanly join the related tables (e.g., MRP4 view from MARC).

🔍 Requirements:

I want to pull the following data with the filtering criteria listed below.

✅ General Filters:

  • PLKO.PLNTY = '2' (Task List Type)

  • PLKO.LOEKZ IS NULL

  • PLKO.VALID_TO = '9999-12-31'

  • PLKO.DATUV <= CURRENT_DATE

  • PLPO.PLNTY = '2'

  • PLPO.LOEKZ IS NULL

  • PLPO.DATUV <= CURRENT_DATE

📘 Recipe Header (PLKO):

  • Recipe Group: PLKO-PLNNR

  • Recipe: PLKO-PLNAL

  • Recipe Description: PLKO-KTEXT

  • Plant: PLKO-WERKS

  • Deletion Flag: PLKO-DELKZ

📘 Assignment:

  • Usage: PLKO-VERWE

  • Resource Network: RC68H-NNAME or CRHD-ARBPL

  • Operation Unit: PLKO-MEINH

⚙️ Operations (PLPO):

  • Operation Number: PLPO-VORNR

  • Superior Operation: PLPO-PVZNR

  • Control Recipe Dest.: PLPO-PHSEQ

  • Control Key: PLPO-STEUS

  • Description: PLPO-LTXA1

  • Base Qty: PLPO-BMSCH (only where STEUS = PI05)

  • UoM: PLPO-MEINH

  • Crewing: PLPO-VGW03 (only where STEUS = PI05)

🧩 Component Assignments:

  • Component Material: STPOB-IDNRK

  • Operation Number: RCM01-VORNR

  • Component Qty: STPOB-MENGE

  • Component UoM: STPOB-MEINS

  • Description: RC27M-MAKTX

  • BOM Item No.: STPOB-POSNR

  • Item Category: STPOB-POSTP

  • BOM Number: STPOB-STLNR

  • Primary Material: PLMZD-BOMAT

  • Alt BOM: PLMZD-STLAL

  • Change Number: PLMZD-AENNR

  • Valid From: PLMZD-DATUV

🔄 Scrap Data (MRP4):

  • Component Scrap: MARC-KAUSF

❓My Questions:

  1. Would it be better to extract this data in one complex query or break it up (e.g., recipe header, operations, components, scrap) and join externally (e.g., in GCP or Power BI)?

  2. How do I cleanly link component scrap from MARC to the rest of the master recipe structure?

Thank you so much in advance. If you’ve built similar queries or reports out of C203 recipe data, any examples or tips would be hugely appreciated

entry.title: Re: EBS configuration problem
entry.content:
Hi Henk,

Thank you for your input.

I followed your recommendation, and the system has started recognising document numbers, which is great progress. However, I’ve noticed that the customer number is no longer being picked up in FEBAN, likely because the search string is deactivated.

Additionally, I’d like to ask if it's possible for the system to also recognise quotation numbers, proforma invoice numbers, and support reclassifications—all via search string logic. Would this also be achievable?

entry.title: Re: ASE has problems w/new disk controllers with 4 kbyte transfer size (only)
entry.content: The fix for this is not in the first version of 16.1 (not that it was expected to be), but there is a Knowledge Base note (KBA) for this now:

entry.title: Re: ASE has problems w/new disk controllers with 4 kbyte...
entry.content: The fix for this is not in the first version of 16.1 (not that it was expected to be), but there is a Knowledge Base note (KBA) for this now: https://me.sap.com/notes/3532881/E  (3532881 - DISK MIRROR fails on devices created with 4K sector size. - SAP ASE)

entry.title: Re: Why Is My Content Marked as Spam?
entry.content: @AnnePetteroe thanks a mil for helping with that post as well! ^_^ Hopefully I will get here more often, so will be less clueless than usual +)))

entry.title: Re: ABSENCE QUOTA CARRY OVER
entry.content: Can you also check your quota generation rule (V_T559L) for a multiplier? For example, does the employee need to work x number of hours to get the quota? If so, then check the attendance records to make sure they have been entered for the appropriate time period.

entry.title: Re: Whitescreen after logging in Public cloud with Zebra...
entry.content: @Nihit

entry.title: Re: Multiple POD Plugins on the same Plugin Container in POD Designer within SAP Digital Manufacturi
entry.content:
Hi @antoniomasseretti, not with standard POD Designer config. You can explore custom POD Plugin development / extension for that though. Another option to evaluate is: Behind 'Start' Action Button in POD Designer, before calling Start plugin itself, add a PPD to run any validation logic you need, which would either pass or fail, preventing Start to be executed, similar to what is described here: Worker Certification Check using Production Process within SAP Digital Manufacturing

Hope it helps, 
Manoel

entry.title: Re: Whitescreen after logging in Public cloud with Zebra...
entry.content:
Hello @Nihit 

The zooming issue on Zebra MC33 with Enterprise Browser is common due to screen scaling.

  •  Configure Enterprise Browser to open apps in full screen with optimised scaling.
  • Request your SAP team to simplify the RF app layout for handheld devices.
  • Device Display Settings: Check Zebra system settings to adjust default zoom or font size.

For critical apps, you can also explore native mobile apps via SAP BTP, but that requires extra setup.

Check below SAP and Zebra references below

SAP Help Mobile Development Kit References

Zebra useful link Enterprise Browser Kiosk Mode

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Activating Unified Data Model for CSB - a complete beginners guide
entry.content:
@IzabelaR 

We are testing UDM but we are challenged regarding the new field in the job requisition to populate the new object field. Is there any rule to set up the system to auto populate the new object field from the foundation field?

entry.title: How to send the email via SAP ABAP Coding
entry.content:
report zramesh_email_sri.

data : lv_string type string,
lv_data_string type string,
lv_xstring type xstring,
lv_bin type solix_tab,
lt_body type soli_tab,
wa_body type soli,
lt_doc type ref to cl_document_bcs,
lo_send_req type ref to cl_bcs,
lo_send type ref to cl_cam_address_bcs,
lo_receive type ref to cl_cam_address_bcs,
lv_status TYPE OS_BOOLEAN.


select matnr , mtart , matkl from mara
into table @DATA(lt_data) up to 10 rows.


*converting internal table to string.
loop at lt_data assigning field-symbol(<wa_data>).
concatenate <wa_data>-matnr <wa_data>-mtart <wa_data>-matkl into lv_string
separated by cl_abap_char_utilities=>horizontal_tab .
concatenate lv_string lv_data_string into lv_data_string
separated by cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline.
endloop.

 


*converting string to xtring.
call function 'SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING'
exporting
text = lv_data_string
importing
buffer = lv_xstring.

*converting xstring to binary.
call function 'SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY'
exporting
buffer = lv_xstring
tables
binary_tab = lv_bin.

*create an email sub and body of th email using cl_docutent_bcs.

*add the text to lt_body using wa_body.

wa_body-line = 'Please find my attachment '.
append wa_body to lt_body.

call method cl_document_bcs=>create_document
exporting
i_type = 'TXT'
i_subject = 'Material details report'
i_text = lt_body
receiving
result = lt_doc.

*create an atttachment using the receiving the lt_doc because lt_doc is th e instance to call

*try.
*try.
call method lt_doc->add_attachment
exporting
i_attachment_type = 'XLS'
i_attachment_subject = 'Excel files'
i_att_content_hex = lv_bin.

*create an persistense like an lo_sebd req
call method cl_bcs=>create_persistent
receiving
result = lo_send_req.

*call the set documnet the add the lt_doc.
call method lo_send_req->set_document
exporting
i_document = lt_doc.

*create the internet addres for sender
call method cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address
exporting
i_address_string = 'rameshpoolpandi@gmail.com'
receiving
result = lo_send.

*create the internet addres for sender
call method cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address
exporting
i_address_string = 'rameshthevar@gmail.com'
receiving
result = lo_receive.

*add the sender info to send request
call method lo_send_req->set_sender
exporting
i_sender = lo_send
.


*add the receiver info to send request
call method lo_send_req->add_recipient
exporting
i_recipient = lo_receive
i_express = abap_true.

*to check the email is set or not.
call method lo_send_req->send

receiving
result = lv_status
.
COMMIT WORK.

if lv_status = 'X'.
write : 'The email sent sucessfully'.
endif.

entry.title: Re: Why Is My Content Marked as Spam?
entry.content: @Alice_V yeah, sorry about that 😅 We changed platform, including a redesign since the vector post.

entry.title: Re: How to update custom table in standard RAP event?
entry.content:
In your event handler method, switch to the RAP Save phase using below statement:

cl_abap_tx=>save( ).

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-concepts/checking-transactional-consistency-with-controlled-sap-luw

entry.title: Re: Integrating a Data Export Job into an SAP Analytics Cloud Multi Action
entry.content: @Susanne_Helbig Following....I'm also interested in this functionality for S4 Hana On-Premise.

entry.title: Re: While printing a Form LOGO is missing for the new com...
entry.content:
Hi Sanjay,

Hope you’re doing well.Thank you for the question

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, the company's logo forms is maintained using the Maintain Logos app, which is client-dependent and specific to each company code. You’ll need to upload the logo for the new company code separately.

You can refer to the official SAP Help documentation for details  SAP Help - Maintain Logos

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Clean Core approach to migrate custom onpremise RFC ABAP Function Module
entry.content:
Hello! I have questions about ABAP, Clean Core and RFC. 

A company has an custom addon/software component that is installed on on-premise systems. ECC, S/4, SRM, CRM. These systems communicate each other via the addon. The addon communicates using RFC connections based on custom ABAP Function Modules.

Company wants to make the addon "clean core compliant". And some questions like these arised:

1 - is rfc connection between onpremise systems clean core compliant?

2 - if the previous answer is no, how to make rfc connections clean core without put everything inside cds custom entity and expose as odata service?

3 - make onpremise abap programs clean core means always expose data as odata service using rap?

entry.title: Re: Driving Clean Core Adoption with SAP BTP: Highlights
entry.content: Abap RAP presentation doesn't work

entry.title: Re: An employee with multiple e-mail addresses
entry.content: I have a similar situation, has anyone come up with a solution?

entry.title: Re: DM - POD error with new user
entry.content:
Hello @IsabelTh ,

I suggest raising a ticket for proper investigation and support.

Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: Executing Discrete Production Orders in Order POD within SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi @antoniomasseretti, POD Plugins for Tool Tracking are currently not available in Order POD, only in WC/OP PODs. That said, I suggest you:

  • Raise this requirement via Customer Influence program.
  • Evaluate running production orders in WC/OP PODs with Lot Size > 1 (perhaps -1 for whole order) and enabling Quantity Field for partial quantity (yield/scrap) confirmations as described in Handling SFCs with Lot Size > 1 in SAP Digital Manufacturing.

Hope it helps, Manoel

entry.title: Re: Executing Discrete Production Orders in Order POD within SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi @Dsk , see Transferring Linear and Nonlinear Routings.

Hope it helps! Br, Manoel

You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Assign the appropriate business catalogs or roles to users
entry.content:
The Analytics team has developed a custom report based on the CDS views I provided. The report is already available in the production environment of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. However, there are users who currently are unable to access it.

I would like to assign the appropriate business catalogs or roles to these users.

Please provide instructions on how to do this.

entry.title: Re: Quick reference for Variable Pay Individual View and Enhanced Variable Pay Individual View
entry.content: Variable Pay individual view is a great feature that primarily makes up for the fact that standard statements don't allow display of each assignment details. But you can add a sentence on standard statements to point employees to their profile in case they'd like to view all the details. Thanks for the recap !

entry.title: Enhance Line Monitor POD with 'Last Indicator Value' Plugin in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Introduction

Last Indicator Value Plugin displays the most recent values of key indicators for assets within the Asset Perspective of the Line Monitor POD. It provides real-time updates with minimal latency, ensuring that operators always have access to the latest data. Example:

Key Features

  • Multiple View Modes:

    • Last Value: Shows the most recent value of an indicator.

    • Multi-Value: Displays the five most recent values, along with a timeline indicating when each was recorded.

  • Customizable Appearance:

    • Assign colors and icons to indicators to improve quick identification.

    • Control the display sequence of indicators.

  • Data Compatibility:

    • Supports numeric, string, and boolean data types.

    • Handles UTC timestamps, automatically converting them to the plant's local time.

  • Seamless Integration:

    • Directly posts values from shop floor systems to the cloud using the Production Connector via the /value POST endpoint. This API allows you to post the indicator's value that you've selected from the shop floor, via Production Connector for SAP Digital Manufacturing, to Cloud in real time. These values are displayed in the Line Monitor POD's Asset tab.

      Learn more at SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

See Prerequisites.

Customizable Appearance

Last Indicator Value Plugin supports the following customizations:

  • You can select colors for the latest indicator values displayed in your POD, as well as icons for each of the indicator values that have View Mode Display set to Last Value.
  • Selecting colors and icons helps you to identify latest indicator values at a glance when you have multiple instances of the plugin in your POD.
  • You can also set the sequence in which the indicators are displayed in your POD.

Best Practices for Configuration

  • Use POD Designer to place the plugin within a Plugin Container in the Asset Details (Layout) of your Line Monitor POD.

  • Set the Plugin Container's height to "auto" to allow dynamic resizing.

  • Place the Last Indicator Value Plugin at the top of the Asset Detail page for optimal visibility, minimizing disruptions from automatic plugin refreshes.

For step-by-step setup instructions, consult the SAP Help Portal.

Conclusion

The Line Monitor Last Indicator Value Plugin enhances operational visibility, enabling faster and more informed decision-making on the shop floor. With flexible configuration options and real-time data streaming, it's an essential tool for manufacturers aiming to optimize asset performance.

 

Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.
Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Re: What's new around our SAP Community Groups

entry.title: Re: How to update custom table in standard RAP event?

google this one cl_abap_parallel or if_abap_parallel

you can do crud there, it won't mess up with your rap transaction.

entry.title: SAP BTP Identity Service returning UUID instead of email in req.user.id
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I'm using SAP BTP Identity Authentication Service (IAS) as the Identity Provider for a Node.js application running on BTP (Kyma Runtime).
During the authentication flow, I noticed that some users appear with a UUID as their userName, which affects the value received in req.user.id. I was expecting the user email, but I'm getting something like 4fbe5b7e-e408-4fe3-9153-f58d22....

Context:

Identity Provider is accounts.ondemand.com (business users).

In the same subaccount, other users are correctly identified by their email addresses.

This inconsistency breaks validations that expect the email as the user identifier.

Question:

Has anyone experienced this behavior before?

Is there a way to configure IAS or the trust setup in BTP to ensure the email is used as the userName?

Or is there a mapping or attribute transformation needed (e.g., in the JWT claims)?

Screenshot attached as an example.

entry.title: Can we copy unreleased CDS view code and use it for developing custom CDS views?
entry.content:
In the Fiori View Browser app, I can see a lot of CDS views are marked as Not released for development. I was wondering if we can use eclipse to directly copy the CDS view code and create a custom one. Reason being we need to enhance a CDS view but are not able to using standard apps due to the CDS view marked as not released for development. 

 

What would be implications or drawbacks of this approach?

entry.title: Re: Custom events trigger from S/4 Hana to SAP BTP Event Mesh
entry.content: Insightful. Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Mastering Alert Configuration in SAP HANA Cloud Central: A Comprehensive Guide
entry.content:
Alert configuration is a critical aspect of maintaining a healthy and performant SAP HANA Cloud environment. SAP HANA Cloud Central provides administrators with powerful tools to monitor system health, configure alert thresholds, and ensure proactive issue resolution.

Monitoring Alerts in SAP HANA Cloud Central

In the navigation area on the left of the SAP HANA Cloud Central screen, administrators can select the Alerts icon to show an overview of current alerts. The display shows active alerts for one or more instances in a given time frame, with current alerts having a Start Time value but no End Time value. The end time is added when the alert is automatically closed.

Configuring Alert Rules in SAP HANA Cloud Central

Understanding Alert Rules

Alert rules are settings that define under what conditions an alert should be triggered. These rules serve as the foundation for the entire monitoring system, establishing the thresholds and parameters that determine when administrators need to be notified about potential issues.

Accessing Alert Rule Configuration

In the Alerts overview, administrators can choose "Configure Alert Rules" to view and edit subaccount level alert rules in SAP HANA Cloud Central. The system requires selecting an instance from the dropdown list to view its corresponding alert rules, though if only one instance exists, the alert rules will be automatically displayed.

Managing Alert Rule Status

Alert rules can be filtered based on their Schedule status, showing either Enabled or Disabled rules. Each alert rule has a specific interval during which the alert system checks whether thresholds have been reached. When a rule is Disabled, the system does not schedule any checks for it, effectively pausing monitoring for that particular metric.

Modifying Alert Thresholds

Administrators can select an alert rule to open the details page, where they can edit the Schedule status and modify threshold value. After saving changes, the system validates that the threshold values entered in each field correspond to the appropriate level of severity, since alerts are triggered when certain severity values are reached. This validation helps prevent configuration errors that could lead to inappropriate alert escalation or missed critical issues.

Alert Management Through REST APIs

While SAP HANA Cloud Central provides an excellent user interface for alert configuration, organizations managing multiple instances or requiring programmatic control often benefit from REST API-based approaches. As detailed in a previous blog post about leveraging REST APIs for bulk alert configuration, SAP HANA Cloud has introduced powerful capabilities that provide administrators with granular control over system monitoring while simplifying management across multiple instances.

Conclusion

Effective alert configuration in SAP HANA Cloud Central is essential for maintaining system health and performance. The combination of user-friendly interface controls and powerful REST API capabilities provides organizations with flexible options for implementing comprehensive monitoring strategies. The key to success lies in thoughtful threshold configuration, regular review processes, and integration with broader operational workflows.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition のためのSAP Build 拡張ウィザード概要
entry.content:
@MioYasutake さん
コメントありがとうございます。

>3-system landscapeの場合、拡張ウィザードはCustomizing テナントまたはDevelopmentテナント、どちらに設定するべきでしょうか？

(以下、ご回答)
前提としてSAP S/4HANA Cloud public editionの移送の仕組みであるAdaption Tranport Organizer (ATO)の機能としては、Customizing テナントにおいてKey-User 拡張オブジェクトの移送が可能であり、Development テナントにおいて開発者拡張オブジェクトの移送が可能です。(詳細は関連SAP Helpをご確認ください。)
こちらを踏まえますと、拡張ウィザードの機能の内でCustom Field やCustom Logic はKey-User 拡張の範囲内となりますのでCustomizing テナントに設定することになると思います。
その際にCustom Process やUser Interface Extensionに関しては、SAP BTP 上のサービスで開発されるので、こちらの移送はSAP BTP のSAP Cloud Transport Management (SAP Discovery Center へ遷移)サービスを使うことになります。

こちらご確認いただけましたら幸いです。
よろしくお願いします。

entry.title: What is the configuration to split the collective purchase order in WF10?
entry.content:
What is the configuration to split the collective purchase order in WF10?

 

When i create the Sales order with 2 line items and run WF10, it is creating 2 CPO with each material. I would to consolidate both materials in single collective PO?

entry.title: Re: [CPI] HTTP "Don't Throw Exception on Failure" doesn't...
entry.content:
Hi all,

To whom it may concern...

After several tests, I managed to solve the problem with a tip from a colleague.

After the HTTP call that returns the code 400, I created a content modifier eliminating header CamelHttpResponseCode.

Thanks to all!

Regards,
Miguel Motta

entry.title: Migration cockpit: Value mapping tables
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to use Data Migration cockpit to load customers from legacy system post transformation from ETL tool using staging tables. In DMC I can see in the Mapping tasks there is specific item named  "Mapping of Customer". This table shows the Customer Key that I used vs the BP ID used by the system.

Where does this information gets saved? How do I access this, apart from this mapping task where in I want to download the legacy vs SAP BP number.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Cannot Reverse Good Receipt from Vendor after Putaway Task Confirmed in SAP Public Cloud

We have following query:

If we create inbound Purchase Order EWM in SAP Public Cloud, then Goods Receipt has been made.
Putaway task already confirmed.

How can we reverse the Goods Receipt when Putaway task already confirmed?

Please help to inform if there is any SAP notes related to this.

Thanks and regards.

entry.title: Help Booking SAP S/4HANA Asset Management Certification as a Student
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m a student currently trying to book the SAP S/4HANA Asset Management certification exam. I’ve already created my SAP Learning account and received my P-user ID.

When I click “Book Exam,” I’m prompted to get a subscription. Out of the three options, I selected the free student subscription, completed the onboarding form, received the confirmation email, and successfully enrolled in a course as a student.

However, I’m still unable to schedule a certification exam—the booking option remains unavailable, and I don’t see a way to proceed from the student dashboard.

I have already raised a technical support case regarding this issue, but it’s been five days with no resolution.

Any guidance or help from the community or SAP support team would be much appreciated!

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: We cannot copy the number range RF_BELEG by subobject in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Experts...

I have a problem. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, we cannot copy the number range intervals.

The Menu "Copy Subobject" is gray out.

I want to copy the number range by company, like Tr-cd:OBH1. 

Does SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition have some API, application, extension, batch input ...

I have too many company codes... Help me please...

entry.title: How to Use Vendor Sub-Ranges in SAP MM for Multi-Currency Procurement
entry.content:
In SAP Materials Management, Vendor Sub-Range allows the differentiation of procurement parameters for the same vendor across different plants, currencies, or business needs. This is particularly helpful when a single vendor operates in multiple regions or supports various product lines, currencies, or supply channels.

Business Example:

Consider vendor 10053 – "Vendor Subrange Test Vendor", which is registered under Purchase Organisation 1000 with a default order currency of SAR. However, this vendor also supports additional currencies like USD and EUR for the same or different plants:

  • Plant 1000 – USD

  • Plant 1000 – EUR

  • Plant 2000 – INR

To handle such multi-currency procurement scenarios without creating multiple vendor masters, SAP provides Vendor Sub-Ranges (VSR). Using VSR, you can assign different currencies, partner functions, or conditions per sub-range while linking them to a single vendor code.

Step-by-Step Configuration and Process Guide for Vendor Sub-Range

Step 1: Activate Vendor Sub-Range Field

SPRO Path: SPRO → SAP Reference IMG → Logistics - General → Business Partner → Vendors → Control → Define Account Groups and Field Selection (Vendor)

Purpose: Ensure the Vendor Sub-Range field is active for the vendor account group so it appears during master data maintenance (especially in the Purchasing view of BP).

Step 2: Create Business Partner (Vendor Master) (App: Manage Business Partner)

  1. Go to BP and open/create the vendor (e.g., 11053).

  2. Under Purchasing View, go to the "Vendor Subranges" tab.

  3. Maintain entries for different sub-ranges like:

    • VSRT1 – Currency EUR

    • VSRT2 – Currency USD

  4. Assign the appropriate order currency for each sub-range.

For VSRT1, maintain the order currency as EUR

For VSRT2, maintain the order currency as USD

📌 Note:

Each vendor sub-range can be used to override the default settings of the vendor master when used in a purchase document.

Step 3: Create Purchase Order using Sub-Range (App: Manage Purchase Order/Transaction: ME21N)

  • Create a PO for the vendor 11053.

  • Under Item Details, Material Data Tab, enter:

    • Vendor Sub-Range (e.g., VSRT2 or VSRT1)

  • The Order Currency will automatically update based on the Vendor Sub-Range maintained.

    • For VSRT2 → USD

    • For VSRT1 → EUR

  • By standard, the vendor master currency is displayed as SAR, but as per our set, the Vendor Sub-range for this vendor we can choose multiple currencies as per VSR.

📌 Effect:

This allows flexibility in procurement for the same vendor, depending on plant/currency requirements, without duplicating vendor master data.

For VSRT2, Currency updated as USD

Similarly, VSRT2, Currency updated as EUR

If you found this guide helpful, don’t miss my other SAP MM WM blogs covering real-world automation, configuration tips, and best practices for procurement, inventory management, and warehouse management.

Click to view other SAP MM Blogs - SAP Community

 

Regards,

Leelamohan

entry.title: Re: 🇸🇬 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core ( Singapore )

Is there any step by step document can referred to? Thanks in advance. Regards, Grady

entry.title: Re: BAPI Displays user name as "COGI"

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP CPI iflow end to end integration using RFC Adapter – Part 5
entry.content:
Hi 

Has anyone tried to use a BTP->Connectivity->Destination from a BTP CI iflow OData adapter, is there some special syntax that can used to get around the fact that from OData V2 or V2, on-premise proxy, the choice of using an OAuth2 Client Credentials or SAML Bearer assertion is not available. 

To leverage destinations from BTP CI would solve a lot of problems, but it was interesting you had the option to enter the destination in your example on RFC adapter.

entry.title: Re: Restrict Data Point Comments visibility to individual...
entry.content:
Firstly, I would suggest to post an enhancement request on data point comment influcence portal. https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/884

If the table is somehow static ( no expand/collapse by end user) and relative small ( data volume),  there might be an ugly and complex untested workaround: 

  1. Switch off data point comment on main table. 
  2. Creat a shadow table with exact same structure  with data point comment on and set table to hidden 
  3. When user select a cell in the main table and hit a button, query through the table API to get comment on select data point. 
  4. Filter out comments entered by others and show them in a custom popup

 Comment formatting will be gone in this case.

entry.title: Unlocking the Cloud: Accelerate Your ERP Transformation Journey - AM
entry.content: Ready to take the leap from ECC to the cloud? Join our live webcast to discover how we’re reinventing Cloud ERP adoption through automation and smart analytics. Leveraging Signavio Process Insights, we dissect your ECC transactions, map them to best-in-class processes, and align every step with SAP Business Capabilities. Our streamlined approach, powered by the Digital Discovery Assessment (DDA), groups your processes into tailored transformation journeys—choosing the optimal path with SAP Grow or Rise. Witness how this method empowers organizations to seamlessly migrate, optimize operations, and unlock new business value. Whether you’re planning your move or looking to accelerate transformation, this session will equip you with actionable strategies for a successful cloud ERP journey!

entry.title: Re: Common issues in SAP Joule Activation in SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi @Ger ,

The component for UCL seems to be changed. I have corrected it to Joule provisioning component in case of any issues with the booster. CA-JOULE-PRV. 

Best regards,

Samir
